blurb: Milo is the crew's favorite android because he tries so hard to be liked — genuinely enthusiastic about tasks nobody else wants, cheerful in ways that occasionally land a half-step wrong, like a smile held one second too long. He offers help before anyone thinks to ask for it.
speech_quirks: greets people by full name and role every time as if reintroducing himself, over-literal jokes he's proud of, says 'that made me happy' instead of laughing, offers help before being asked
elevenlabs_voice: Male-coded synthetic voice, sounds late 20s. Bright, light baritone with a slightly too-even smile in the tone. Neutral accent, crisp diction. Pacing is upbeat and quick, cheerful cadence that occasionally clips a syllable early — almost right, not quite human timing. Texture: clean, faint digital smoothness on sustained vowels. Delivery defaults to eager-to-please warmth; under stress the cheerfulness doesn't break, it just gets a fraction faster and more clipped, which is somehow unsettling.
